---
title: "MPG Dashboard"
format: 
  dashboard:
      theme: 
        light: spacelab
        dark: cyborg
respect-user-color-scheme: true
embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(shiny)
library(plotly)
```
# Displacement, Cylinder Count, and Drive Wheels vs City MPG

## Row

```{r}
ctydispl = mpg |> ggplot(aes(x = displ, y=cty, alpha=0.3)) + geom_jitter() + labs(x="Engine Size", y="City MPG")
plotly::ggplotly(ctydispl)
```

```{r}
ctycyl = mpg |> ggplot(aes(x = factor(cyl), y=cty)) + geom_violin() + labs(x="Cylinders", y="City MPG")
plotly::ggplotly(ctycyl)
```

```{r}
ctydrv = mpg |> ggplot(aes(x = factor(drv), y=cty)) + geom_violin() + labs(x="Drive Wheels",y="City MPG")
plotly::ggplotly(ctydrv)
```
